kpi.range_today.en: Session P&L from Profit bridge or journal — resets at B3 open.

kpi.range_5d.en: Rolling 5-day P&L, win rate, and PF₂₀ from closed trades.

kpi.range_20d.en: Rolling 20-day performance — aligns with PF₂₀ window.

kpi.range_ytd.en: Year-to-date P&L and stats from journal + Profit exports.

kpi.win_rate.en: Win rate (%) — winning trades / total closed in range.

kpi.profit_factor.en: Profit factor on last 20 trades — gross wins / gross losses.

kpi.slippage.en: Avg slippage in ticks — paper spread + 1 tick model vs ideal.

kpi.week_pnl.en: Week P&L rollup — Profit bridge + journal when available.

kpi.filters.en: Date range chips — filter P&L, win%, and PF₂₀ from journal rollups.
